name: vid_segment
description: Segment a single video frame given a point or box prompt. Select the source frame with EITHER {video, frameIndex} (video: sandbox-relative video path; frameIndex: 0-based frame index) OR {frame} (sandbox-relative PNG path) — exactly one of the two. Also pass {prompt}: one of {point: {x, y, label?}}, {points: [{x, y, label}]}, or {box: {x0, y0, x1, y1}}, all in the frame's ORIGINAL pixel coordinates. Returns {maskPath, area, width, height} where maskPath is a sandbox-relative PNG (white=object, 0/255) and area is the object's pixel count. Use for a one-off still-frame cutout; use vid_track to follow an object across the whole video.
